bucket_3a.evidence: 172 removed lines with 'larp' keyword in git history — spec ownership transferred to larpingapp; code may have existed in OpenRegister before redirect

bucket_3b.note: status:redirect — owned by root openspec cross-app pattern
Draft/published lifecycle — RevertHandler covers rollback but no DraftService or version entity found; spec partially implemented via audit trail + revert only
Visual diff comparison between versions — no diffing service found in codebase
Delta strategy for drafts vs full snapshots — audit trail stores full diffs but delta-only draft storage not found
Configuration promotion between OTAP environments — TenantLifecycleService has environment validation (REQ-005) but promotion-copy feature not found
Mock data seeding (BRP/KVK/BAG/DSO/ORI registers) — no seed JSON files or MockRegisterService found in main codebase
Test coverage tracking spec — no production code REQs
CI workflow configuration in .github/workflows — not a production code REQ

forbidden-debug-calls.pattern: print_r() used for string conversion — replace with json_encode() or (string) cast

direct-sql-prepare.pattern: Direct $this->db->prepare() for referential integrity cross-table queries
Multiple direct $this->db->prepare() calls for linked entity lookups

notes: 1532 @spec annotation lines across 249 files pointing at 138 unique change/task refs — bulk of codebase already tagged via retrofit runs
8 specs are status:redirect stubs pointing to other app repos — correctly excluded from Bucket 1
content-versioning is partially implemented: RevertHandler/RevertController cover rollback (Bucket 1 with NEEDS-REVIEW) but draft/publish lifecycle, visual diffs, and delta storage are Bucket 3b
mariadb-ci-matrix is a CI infrastructure spec; unit-test-coverage-phase2 is a test tracking spec — neither has production code REQs
ADR-014 compliance excellent: 0 non-migration PHP files missing @license (all 524 non-migration PHP files have license headers)
8 direct $this->db->prepare() calls bypass QueryBuilder — mostly in low-level cross-table queries where QueryBuilder cannot express required SQL; flag for review
1 print_r() call in lib/Db/SchemaMapper.php:892 — used for string conversion, harmless but should be replaced
Bucket 2a has 14 clusters; Bucket 2b has 11 clusters — all need /opsx-reverse-spec or /opsx-extend passes to create specs
Bucket 2b warning: cluster labels 'sources', 'security-auth', 'applications' are namespace words — needs human pre-split before reverse-spec
Larping: 172 removed git lines — strong evidence of prior code, but spec redirect makes this 3b not 3a
